title: picris spinosa
intro: Picris spinosa, also known as prickly scabious or thistle milk thistle, is a biennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as constipation, bloating, and indigestion due to its ability to stimulate bowel movements and improve gut health. The health benefits of Picris spinosa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Picris spinosa is often used as a tincture or tea, and it can also be found in combination with other herbs in supplements and capsules.
